meta.note: Quotes, news, earnings & analyst trends are live (Finnhub). Technicals are derived from live price/returns; options chains, IV and flow are modeled (no free options data).

news.headline: Tech reporter Joanna Stern asked AI to do 'almost everything' for a year—the No. 1 tool she'll keep using
news.summary: "I Am Not a Robot" author Joanna Stern integrated dozens of AI applications into her life over the course of a year. She says this one has stuck with her.

news.headline: Albertsons stock plunges as it says weaker grocery spending will cut into sales and earnings
news.summary: Shares of Albertsons sank Thursday after the grocer reported softness in its core business and lowered its full-year outlook as a result.

news.headline: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Thursday
news.summary: Tesla missed on earnings despite beating revenue estimates. Plus, Club names Honeywell Technologies and Dover released results.

news.headline: Traders see September rate hike as European Central Bank mulls energy price spike
news.summary: ECB president Christine Lagarde said the bank anticipates inflation to remain "well above target" until the first half of 2027.

news.headline: Trump says Saudi nuclear deal does not include enrichment, Riyadh must join Abraham Accords
news.summary: "There will be no enrichment of material!" the president said in a Truth Social post.

news.headline: China refiners snap up September Russian crude, eye Iranian oil as Mideast supply risks grow - Reuters
news.summary: China refiners snap up September Russian crude, eye Iranian oil as Mideast supply risks grow  Reuters

news.headline: Retiring in 2029? 3 Key Investing Moves You Should Make Today.
news.summary: It's time to make sure you're ready to take that leap.

news.headline: Which S&P500 stocks are gapping on Thursday?
news.summary: Let's have a look at the S&P500 gap up and gap down stocks in today's session.

news.headline: The Big Question Hanging Over Netflix Stock
news.summary: With the stock already under pressure, the biggest risk for investors is a fundamental shift in how the company measures success, just as its growth is visibly slowing.

keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $690.39 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $737.31 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into the open: Strong Bearish — favor puts / short delta.
Use QQQ $690.39 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: MSFT PUT — enter $12.37–$13.67, target $19.53+, stop $7.81.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Futures point to a softer open with QQQ -2.12% and SPY -1.35%. Composite sentiment -76 (Strong Bearish). The tape is being driven mainly by spy trend, qqq / mega-cap tech, vix. VIX at 18.31 (+6.61%). Environment read: favor puts / short delta. Energy (+2.32%) is leading while Consumer Discretionary (-9.36%) lags. Premarket strength in XOM, LLY; weakness in TSLA, GOOGL. The desk's highest-conviction setup is MSFT (7.9/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
